CHANGE RECORD 
 
 
When the quality of the products changes, the QuID is updated, and a row is added to this table.   
The third column specifies which sections or sub-sections have been updated.  The fourth column should 
mention the reason for updating the document. Column 5 should include the names of the author(s) 
doing the changes. Including the name in column 6 shows that the document has been validated by the 
TAC/MFC PQ leader or deputy (or TAC/MFC PQ leader or the deputy). This validation means the 
document was checked for contents, formats and consistency with other documents.

 ACRONYM TABLE 
Acronym Description 
ADCP Acoustic Doppler Current Profiler 
AVISO Archiving, Validation and Interpretation of Satellite Oceanographic 
data (service of French space agency CNES) 
BLK Black Sea 
EAN Estimated Accuracy Number 
ECMWF European Centre for Medium-Range Weather Forecasts 
EIS Entry Into Service 
Hmax Maximum Wave Height 
JS1/2/3 Jason-1/2/3 Satellite Missions 
M Month 
MFC Monitoring Forecasting Centre 
MY Multi-year 
MYP Multi-Year Product 
NRT Near Real Time 
OI Optimal Interpolation 
SWH Significant Wave Height (VHM0) 
TAC Copernicus Marine Service Thematic Assembly Centre 
TM02 TM02 Mean Wave Period 
Tp Wave Peak Period 
U10 Wind speed at 10 metre height 
WAM WAve Model (numerical wave model) 
WAV Waves 
Y Year 
 
KEY DEFINITIONS 
Numerical wave model Numerical model based on gravity wave spectra solving the energy 
density balance equation. 
Significant wave height Average height of the highest one-third of the waves (computed from 
spectra by: 𝑆𝑊𝐻 = 4√𝑚0 with 𝑚0 = zeroth spectral moment). 
Swell Waves not correlated with the local wind field (wave phase speed > 
wind speed). 
Wave spectrum Wave energy at each wave frequency for each direction. 
Wind sea Waves generated and characterised by local winds (wave phase speed < 
wind speed).

catalog_entry.summary: This document is a Quality Information Document (QuID) for Black Sea multi-year wave products, detailing product specifications and changes over time.
